info.name: RentFlow / CribHub API (complete)
info.description:
**FeathersJS v5 + Koa** REST surface for `rentflow_api`. Default port **3036**.

**Auth**: Run **Authentication → Login (local)**; tests auto-save `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, `userId`, `userEmail` when present.

**URL**: Each request sets `protocol`, `host`, `port`, `path`, and `query` (not only `raw`) so Postman shows the endpoint after import. Use environment vars **`apiProtocol`**, **`apiHost`**, **`apiPort`**; optional **`baseUrl`** = `{{apiProtocol}}://{{apiHost}}:{{apiPort}}` for scripts.

**Real-time**: Socket.io shares the same base URL; this collection is **HTTP only**.

**Paystack webhook**: Requires raw body + `x-paystack-signature`; use Paystack CLI or dashboard replays for real tests.

**Multipart**: `POST …/files-uploader/file-upload` with form fields + file(s).

**OAuth** (optional): If configured, browser flows use `/oauth/google`, `/oauth/facebook` (see `@feathersjs/authentication-oauth`).

**Admin bootstrap**: `POST /admin-bootstrap` requires server env **`ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET`** (≥16 chars) matching Postman **`{{adminBootstrapSecret}}`**. Then use **Create admin user** or **Grant admin to existing user**.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: `POST /authentication` — strategies: `local`, `jwt`. Unverified users may receive 403 on login.

item.name: Admin bootstrap
item.description:
**Public** `POST /admin-bootstrap` (no JWT). Server must set **`ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET`** (min 16 characters). Postman **`adminBootstrapSecret`** must match exactly.

- **Create admin user**: new account; gets **tenant** (default signup) + **admin**; **isVerified** set true so login works.
- **Grant admin to existing user**: `mode: promote` + email; marks verified and adds **admin** if missing.

request.description: Set `adminBootstrapSecret` in Postman environment = `ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET` on the API. Then run Login with the new email/password.

item.name: Refresh tokens
item.description: `POST` exchanges refresh token. `PATCH` / `DELETE` require JWT per hooks.

item.name: Users
item.description: **create** is public signup. External **find/get/patch/remove** scoped to self (non-admin).

item.name: User roles
item.description: External **create**: only **tenant** self-assign. Other roles via admin / approved **role-requests**.

item.name: Properties
item.description: Listing queries support `$search`, `type`, `superAgent`, `mine`, etc. (see `properties` service + schema).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Tower",
  "address": "1 Test Street",
  "city": "Accra",
  "country": "Ghana",
  "propertyType": "Apartment",
  "description": "Seed from Postman",
  "area": "East Legon",
  "bedrooms": 2,
  "bathrooms": 2,
  "price": 3500,
  "priceCurrency": "GHS",
  "pricePeriod": "monthly"
}

item.name: Payments
item.description:
**Manual entry** (landlord): body uses `paymentDataSchema` — `tenantId`, `unitId`, `amount` (+ optional fields); `landlordId` + `reference` auto.

**Paystack**: `create` with `action: initialize` or `action: verify`.

item.name: Files uploader
item.description: Koa route **POST /files-uploader/file-upload** (multipart). Feathers service path **POST /files-uploader** delegates to `create` with parsed files.

request.description: JWT required. Match field names to `koa-body` / formidable setup.

item.name: OAuth (optional)
item.description: If Google/Facebook OAuth is enabled in config, flows redirect via Feathers OAuth middleware (browser).

request.description: Open in browser when OAuth is configured; not a JSON API.
